header: Changelog Data View that feels ready to ship

items.title: Live signal
items.description: Built to show the changelog data view with real labels, compact spacing, modern imagery, and practical states instead of placeholder filler.

items.title: Trend clarity
items.description: Clean hierarchy, restrained borders, and direct actions make this changelog data view easy to scan across desktop and mobile previews.

items.title: Operational pulse
items.description: The seeded content keeps the component sleek, credible, and import-ready while staying inside the Desiderio shadcn design language.
